title: Ḑank Heat Wave
lead: Ḑank is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +6.86. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ḑank has led to extreme temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 23.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 6%, exacerbating the heat. 
 The wind speed of 10.9 km/h offers little relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
